description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. He is wearing dark sunglasses and has neatly styled, voluminous hair. The suit jacket features a badge or emblem on the left chest, suggesting a professional or official role, such as a security agent or business executive. His posture is upright and neutral, with arms relaxed at his sides and feet slightly apart. The shoes are formal and complement the overall business attire. The figure's facial features are partially obscured by the sunglasses, adding an air of anonymity and professionalism.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit with sunglasses, standing upright with a professional demeanor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, sunglasses, and badge on the left chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, hairstyle, and the relaxed position of the arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, suit details, and the formal shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie, formal style, includes a badge or emblem
